changeSet.author: ahri-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology'

changeSet.comment: Backfill notebook_departments for Bacteriology Laboratory templates, bacteriology workflow notebooks, and child instances missing a department link (fixes empty storage hierarchy on notebook Sample Storage pages).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON ts.name = 'Bacteriology' WHERE ( (n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' OR n.title LIKE 'Bacteriology Laboratory - Lab %') OR n.workflow_type = 'bacteriology' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook parent WHERE parent.id = n.parent_notebook_id AND ( parent.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' OR parent.title LIKE 'Bacteriology Laboratory - Lab %' OR parent.workflow_type = 'bacteriology' ) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id AND existing.test_section_id = ts.id );

INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT child.id, parent_departments.test_section_id FROM clinlims.notebook child JOIN clinlims.notebook_departments parent_departments ON parent_departments.notebook_id = child.parent_notebook_id WHERE child.parent_notebook_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = child.id AND existing.test_section_id = parent_departments.test_section_id );
